metadata._note: Over-collateralized CDP stablecoin minted against Aave V3 debt. No 1:1 fiat redemption floor, so the open-market price floated ~$0.96-0.98 through H2-2023 — a STRUCTURAL soft-peg discount, fully backed by Aave debt positions. No unbacked supply, no insolvency. Aave gov treated the sub-peg as a known mechanism gap (later addressed via GSM + rate policy).
Representative GHO/USDC isolated collateral market for the era. Healthy, well-collateralized; the $0.975 mark sits comfortably above the liquidation line.
